description_long: This is a large, round terracotta plant pot with a wide, flared rim and a gently tapering body. The surface is matte and unglazed, showing natural clay coloration with patches of greenish moss and weathering, suggesting outdoor exposure. The rim is thick and slightly uneven, giving the pot a rustic, handmade appearance. The body displays subtle horizontal banding and discoloration, with some areas more heavily stained by mineral deposits or algae. The interior appears hollow and deep, suitable for accommodating substantial root systems. Overall, the pot exudes an aged, earthy character typical of traditional garden or patio planters.
description: A large, weathered terracotta plant pot with a wide rim and mossy, stained surface, exuding a rustic, aged charm.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flared rim and subtle greenish stains on the upper left, with a mostly even, rounded body.
description_view_1: This side highlights a prominent patch of yellow-green moss or lichen on the upper right, with more visible surface weathering.
description_view_2: The view reveals a blend of green and brown discoloration, with the rim and body showing more pronounced textural variation.
description_view_3: This angle displays darker, more concentrated mossy patches on the lower left, and a slightly more shadowed interior.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in residential gardens or patios for decorative planting
